property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Juni Frio

property.name: Text
property.value: On your turn, the first *HACKER program or trojan you play costs 3 *RAM less. Deal X *MF damage to target player, where X is double your *HACKER synergy.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The faceless leader of Null Legion, operating in the shadows. Unseen. Unforgiving. Unstoppable."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Juni Frio

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “They see everything from the comfort of their console.”

property.name: Text
property.value: INDEX 3 *HACKER PROGRAM (Reveal the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 *HACKER program into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Sometimes low-tech storage is the most discreet.”

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an activated ability of target *HACKER character. That ability and its cost replace CTRL+C. (If that ability contains a non-bracketed character name, replace it with Script Kiddie.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Lazy and malicious."

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, you may play target *HACKER script in your recycle bin. As it resolves, purge it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Boot up and dive in."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Phantom Riong

property.name: Text
property.value: When Digital Spectre’s attack hits a player, it also deals 2 *MF damage to that player. Digital Spectre gets STEALTH until turn end. (Character can’t be blocked.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Ghosts and code aren't so different. What is a ghost but something that can't be explained in the physical world?"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Put 1 CORRUPTION counter on target opponent's mainframe. (On NETCHECK, the active player takes 1 *MF damage from each CORRUPTION counter on their mainframe.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Good and evil are a matter of perspective. Code is absolute."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Brian M Narendra

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your cyberdeck for a virus or trojan and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle. Purge Phantom OS.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Remove one thread from a perfect program and the whole thing unravels."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Douglas Duarte

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *MF damage to target player for each program attached to their mainframe.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “She’s not a copy; she’s a reincarnation.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Put a +1/+1 counter on another target *HACKER character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Mysterious symbols scattered throughout the slums of Angel City invite the curious to look deeper."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Move target action on the cache to the top of the cache.

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal X *MF damage to target player, where X is your *HACKER synergy.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A-Z is known for fostering young talent. These orphans have never known the love of a family—only the cold truth of code."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Nate Artuz

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw 1. Search your cyberdeck for a *HACKER or *WONDERLAND card and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle. Purge Nova, the White Rabbit.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Follow me."

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target player’s mainframe becomes UNSTABLE. (They roll a d20 for each character and program they control. If they roll 10 or below, destroy that character or program.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sean Donaldson

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Deal 2 *MF damage to any target.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "WARNING: Voltage level exceeds safe operating threshold! Immediate intervention required to prevent permanent damage."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Deal 4 *MF damage to any target.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Everyone has a plan until they take 240V to the brain."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to target player's mainframe. On their NETCHECK, System Error deals 2 *MF damage to them.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Prevent all damage until turn end.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Anyone who claims to understand quantum theory is either lying or crazy."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: When a player plays a program, they draw 1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A space beyond matter or time; a realm of pure information that can be bent to the will of those who understand it."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Anas Riasat

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player may INDEX 3 PROGRAM. (Reveal the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 program into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Where legends go by three glowing letters."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Reboot the abilities of all *HACKER characters you control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Together we can build a better world, one line of code at a time."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target player reveals their hand and you choose a card from it. They discard that card.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Hook 'em and cook 'em."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Risza Perdhana

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Refresh target character. If that character is a *HACKER, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Stay wired."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value:
ADDITIONAL COST [Pay 3 *MF and 3 *BF health.]
Install 3 *RAM refreshed. On turn end, destroy 3 *RAM you control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Limits are an arbitrary idea created by small people with small minds."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value:
If a source would deal *MF damage to you, prevent that damage and put 1 breach counter on Firewall.
Whenever you put a breach counter on Firewall, if it has 2 or more, purge it.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *MF damage to each character target player controls.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Reese Keefe

property.name: Text
property.value: MALICIOUS (Attach to any target character.) When Cortex Crab becomes attached to a character an opponent controls, refresh that character and reboot its abilities. You control attached character and its attack type is *MF. On turn end, destroy Cortex Crab.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "That tickles."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Douglas Duarte

property.name: Text
property.value: TROJAN (Attach face down on target player's mainframe. You may flip and pay its ability cost to activate on any swift check after the turn it was played, then bin it.) Destroy attacking characters controlled by this player.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Risza Perdhana

property.name: Text
property.value: TROJAN (Attach face down on target player's mainframe. You may flip and pay its ability cost to activate on any swift check after the turn it was played, then bin it.) Copy target script on the cache controlled by an opponent.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Talha Tahir

property.name: Text
property.value: TROJAN (Attach face down on target player's mainframe. You may flip and pay its ability cost to activate on any swift check after the turn it was played, then bin it.) If all of this player's *RAM is running or committed, deal 4 *MF damage to them.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: TROJAN (Attach face down on target player's mainframe. You may flip and pay its ability cost to activate on any swift check after the turn it was played, then bin it.) Deal 3 *MF damage to this player for each of their attacking characters.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: TROJAN (Attach face down on target player's mainframe. You may flip and pay its ability cost to activate on any swift check after the turn it was played, then bin it.) Change the target(s) of target activated ability on the cache.

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Cross a scrapper and you may find yourself on the wrong end of their welding torch."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Put target gear from your recycle bin into your hand.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "One corpo's trash is another slum kid's treasure."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Phantom Riong

property.name: Text
property.value: Target character with 3 or less defense can't block this turn.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Compact, cuddly, and anti-equestrian."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Tablet kids have taken their final form.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sean Donaldson

property.name: Text
property.value: Blackout Boys gets +1/+0 for each other [Blackout Boys] you control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "If you want someone's entire bloodline wiped out between the hours of 10pm–4am, we're your guys."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Cryoblade Assassin gets STEALTH until turn end. (Character can’t be blocked except by characters with VISION.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Cold calculation and deadly precision."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Reese Keefe

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your cyberdeck for a drug and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A much wider selection than your local Omnismart... cheaper too."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Juni Frio

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, Iron Maiden gets +2/+0 and, whenever her attack hits a character, she may also deal that much damage to another target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Born in the clinical cold of a lab, this former Gokudo enforcer now walks a razor's edge as an undercover agent for The Family."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 2 *BF damage to target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A former member of the classified VALKYRIE program, Freya leaves a scorched sky in her wake."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: OVERRUN (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Research Log #324: Attempts to calm the subject have proved unsuccessful. Despite being grown in vitro, it seems to have some kind of genetic memory—a longing for a home it's never known."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hasan

property.name: Text
property.value: DUEL target character. (Both characters' attacks hit each other.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "We'll see if you have so much to say once your jaw is wired shut."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: DUEL target character. (Both characters' attacks hit each other.) If Faceless Oni destroys that character, deal 3 *BF damage to that character's controller.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Fused to his flesh, the mask has become a tomb for his forgotten past."

property.name: Text
property.value: OVERRUN (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.) Until turn end, Lasersaw Berserker gets +2/+0 for each *CYBERNETIC you control. On turn end, destroy him.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The only thing that's real is the present... and my giant lasersaws."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Nate Artuz

property.name: Text
property.value: STAMINA (Character doesn’t run when it attacks.) DUEL target character. (Both characters' attacks hit each other.) You may then gain control of target gear attached to them and attach it to Metal Head.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Heed your master."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Nate Artuz

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *MF damage to characters opponents control. Until turn end, *CYBERNETIC characters you control get OVERRUN and +2/+0 for each cyberware attached to them.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “We are the unwanted trash of this city, but we will not die in obscurity.”

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *BF damage to all characters except [Exterminator].

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Breathe deep. Let it fill your lungs."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Until turn end, target character gets +1/+1 and STAMINA. (Character doesn’t run when it attacks.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Refresh target character and reboot their abilities.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Live in the moment."

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target character is immune to PSYCHOSIS until your next SYSTEM CHECK.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Sanity, Simplified."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Risza Perdhana

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, target character you control gets +4/+4 and +5 PSYCHOSIS. If that character is non-*CYBERNETIC, it gets an additional +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, target character you control gets +7/-1 and +8 PSYCHOSIS. If that character is non-*CYBERNETIC, it gets an additional +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Alvin Septiawan

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +2/+0 and +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.) Whenever its attack hits a character, it may also deal that much damage to another target character.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Pertti Bahaa

property.name: Text
property.value: When attached character attacks, create 2 non-iconic token copies of it that are attacking and running. This character and its copies get +10 PSYCHOSIS, then all make PSYCHOSIS checks for their attacks. On turn end, purge all token copies created this way.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sean Donaldson

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +5/+0.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Enough stopping power to take down a rampaging elephant."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sean Donaldson

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *BF damage to any target.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Banned from use by the ACPD due to public backlash, these deadly blades have proved incredibly popular on the black market."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Douglas Duarte

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +2/+0 for each *CYBERNETIC you control and +10 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +4/+0 and +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.) DUEL target character. (Both characters’ attacks hit each other.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.) When its attack hits a player, destroy target *RAM they control and install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Imad Awan

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets CLOAKED. (Character can't be targeted.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Imad Awan

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +5 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.) Destroy target program.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player may INDEX 3 GEAR. (Reveal the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 gear into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Junaid Badar

property.name: Text
property.value: All characters get STAMINA. (Character doesn’t run when it attacks.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “No pain, no gainz.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "They told me this would look good on my résumé..."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Reese Keefe

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Years of corporate ladder-climbing got him the corner office he always dreamed of. Now he sits there wondering if it was worth it."

property.name: Text
property.value: On enter, install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Born with the net worth of a small country."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Anas Riasat

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy Seeker Drones. If you do, deal 2 *BF damage to any target.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Eliminating the competition."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Douglas Duarte

property.name: Text
property.value: INDEX 3 GEAR (Reveal the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 gear into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “The finest merchandise for the most discerning clientele.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Anas Riasat

property.name: Text
property.value: Run target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "They tirelessly patrol the streets, maintaining the status quo."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Satrya Darma

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your cyberdeck for [Riot Police] and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "We need backup!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target character that has taken damage this turn.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “A true apex predator.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: Counter target program that targets an action on the cache. Put a -1/-1 counter on Yes Man.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "You got it, boss!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Teejay Villahermosa

property.name: Text
property.value: Venture Capitalist enters play with 1 interest counter on her. On your NETCHECK, double the number of interest counters on her. Remove all interest counters from Venture Capitalist and install 1 *RAM running for each interest counter removed.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Junaid Badar

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target tether. Put a BLEED counter on target character. (On NETCHECK, each character controlled by the active player gets a -1/-1 counter for each BLEED counter on it.)

property.name: Text
property.value: When the last refreshed *RAM an opponent controls is run or committed, Debt Collector deals 2 *BF damage to them.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Unwavering loyalty to the highest bidder."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Talha Tahir

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you roll a d20, put a +1/+1 counter on Ed, Card Counter.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "I ensure the odds are always in my favor."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Yu Cheng Hong

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *BF damage to up to 3 target characters. Deal 3 *BF damage to target player.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Paid for with your tax dollars."

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 4 *BF damage to target player.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "All the death that money can buy."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 2 *RAM running. ADDITIONAL COST [Destroy X *RAM in your RAM bank.] Deal X *BF damage to target player.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Money can't buy happiness, but it can buy a gold-plated Volentis, and that's pretty close."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put up to 4 target *RAM from your recycle bin into your RAM bank running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Can you do that?"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: On your NETCHECK, roll a d20. If you roll 9 or higher, install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The ultra-rich of Angel City don't measure their wealth in dollars; they measure it in lifetimes."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: JB Casacop

property.name: Text
property.value: Install X *RAM running, where X is your *CORPO synergy.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "We all know who's really pulling the strings."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Name a faction. Destroy all characters of that faction, then you lose 1 *MF and 1 *BF health for each character destroyed this way.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Words can't express the atrocities that have been committed in the name of profit..."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: If a character you control is destroyed by an opponent, its committed *RAM returns to its owner's RAM bank refreshed.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "It's amazing the things you can write off when you have a creative accountant."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: The *RAM cost of non-*CORPO cards is increased by 1 *RAM. (This includes committed character costs.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Junaid Badar

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT If you would lose the game this turn, instead set your *MF and *BF health to 1 and destroy half of your *RAM, rounded down.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Too big to fail."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever a *CORPO character you control is destroyed by an opponent, install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rahan Karim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Change target(s) of target program.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The glowing screen told them what to think and who to blame."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Eran Fowler

property.name: Text
property.value: Put a -1/-1 counter on all characters. Install 2 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "In the grand tapestry of progress, a few stains are inevitable."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: On enter, draw 1. You may look at any facedown cards in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets VISION. (Character can block characters with STEALTH.) All characters opponents control lose and can't get CLOAKED.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "For the right price, you can see in ways you could never even imagine."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT On enter, prevent all damage to attached character until turn end. Attached character gets +0/+2.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "They're fast, but the synapse needles sting a little."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 2 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "More than just a watch. It's a lifestyle."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player may pay 2 *RAM to reveal cards from their cyberdeck until they reveal a *CORPO character. They put it into their hand and shuffle the rest into their cyberdeck.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "3 billion is a pittance when you consider the global partnerships to be found in international waters."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the player with the most characters in play may install 1 *RAM running. If tied, nothing happens. Each *CORPO character counts as two for this ability.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Life in the Badlands teaches you to be resourceful."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: INDEX 3 ENVIRONMENT (Reveal the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 environment into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Phantom Riong

property.name: Text
property.value: If Canyon Stalkers' attack hits a character with a counter on it, it deals double damage to that character. Put a mark counter on target character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: Sand Scorpion deals *MF damage equal to its attack value to target running character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Masters of the desert landscape, their sting is swift and deadly."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Imad Awan

property.name: Text
property.value: DIVINE 2 (Look at the top 2 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 into your hand, then bin the other.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The desert can show you many things if you know where to look."

property.name: Text
property.value: Put a mark counter on target character. Deal 5 *BF damage to target character with a mark counter.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "One shot, one kill."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, when Coyote Raiders' attack hits a player, destroy target *RAM they control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Blood for the Mother!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Murtaza Shah

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, when Badlands Marauder's attack hits a player, destroy target *RAM they control, then you install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The hidden blade strikes deepest."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: MIRAGE (When character is targeted by an opponent, you may put it into its owner’s hand.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The blades of their razorback cycles rend the desert air like shrapnel through dry flesh.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Target character with 3 or less defense can't block until turn end.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "They've dedicated their lives to a single pursuit... becoming the storm."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: MIRAGE (When character is targeted by an opponent, you may put it into its owner’s hand.) Put 1 *DUSTRUNNER character from your hand into play and set its *RAM cost to 0. On turn end, if this character is in play, put it into its owner's hand.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: If you would draw 1 or more cards outside of your initialize stage, instead draw that many cards plus 1. Until turn end, if the ability of a *DUSTRUNNER environment would trigger, it triggers an additional time.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "United by faith, we will reclaim what is rightfully ours.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: Gain 3 *MF or 3 *BF health. If [The Amrita] is the active environment, instead gain 5 *MF or 5 *BF health.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: Badlands Infantry gets +1/+1 for each other character in their tether chain.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Together, their glaives create a wall of electricity that few are brave enough to face."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “You must survive the storm before you can become it.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Wero Gallo

property.name: Text
property.value: ADDITIONAL COST [Destroy another character you control.] All *DUSTRUNNER characters you control get +3/+3 until turn end.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Your blood will quench the thirst of the Dark One."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target *RAM and target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "You are dust, and to dust you shall return."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Run all non-*DUSTRUNNER characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The corpo mercenaries were completely unprepared for the storms they found in the Badlands. The dustrunners were raised in them."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Roland Amago

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to target player’s mainframe. Whenever they install a *RAM, Growing Unrest deals 1 *MF damage to them.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "For years, the corpos have taken our lands, our water, and our way of life. Today we stand up and say no more!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Imad Awan

property.name: Text
property.value:
ADDITIONAL COST [Run X *DUSTRUNNER characters you control.]
Draw X.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Even the winds leave a trail.”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw 2.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Its nectar peels back the layers of the world, revealing hidden truths to all who walk its path."

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put target *DUSTRUNNER character you control into its owner's hand.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rahan Karim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Destroy target *RAM.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Look at the top 5 cards of target opponent's cyberdeck, then put them back in any order.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever attached character's attack hits a character, put 2 BLEED counters on the character that was hit. (On NETCHECK, each character controlled by the active player gets a -1/-1 counter for each BLEED counter on it.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A traditional weapon passed down through generations. Its blade is coated with a special plant extract which causes profuse bleeding."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +2/+0. If this character is a Dust Devil, it gets an additional +4/+0.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rahan Karim

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player gains 1 *MF and 1 *BF health for each *DUSTRUNNER character they control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "These sacred waters have been the lifeblood of the Aekani faith for thousands of years. Legend says they carry the wisdom of every priestess who has ever touched them."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rushil Kejriwal

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever a *DUSTRUNNER character attacks, deal 1 *MF damage to the defending player.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The beating heart of the Aekani temple, this sacred transmitter allows the high priestess to communicate instantly with every soldier on the battlefield."

property.name: Text
property.value: TETHER (Attach to 2 target characters. If either character leaves play, the tether follows.) The highest base attack value of any character in this tether chain becomes the attack value of all characters in this tether chain. The same is true for defense values.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: TETHER (Attach to 2 target characters. If either character leaves play, the tether follows.) All characters in this tether chain get +1/+1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Alone, we are nothing. Together, we are powerful."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Zhi You

property.name: Text
property.value: TETHER (Attach to 2 target characters. If either character leaves play, the tether follows.) All characters in this tether chain get OVERRUN. (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Some are born with a natural talent for seeing through the fabric of reality."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Adam Roberts

property.name: Text
property.value: DIVINE 2 (Look at the top 2 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 into your hand, then bin the other.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hasan

property.name: Text
property.value:
DATAVAMP (When character’s attack hits a player for *MF damage, you gain that much *MF health.)
When you play a tarot, Celestial Channeler gets +1/+1 until turn end.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Be humble, for you are made of earth. Be noble, for you are made of stars."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Stijn Windig

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, Astral Projector gets +1/+1 until turn end. Astral Projector gets STEALTH until turn end. (Character can’t be blocked.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "She learned long ago that the mind does not follow the same limitations as the body."

property.name: Artist
property.value: MJ Pajaron

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, create a *MF 0/1 Dreamwalker token character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Put target *MYSTIC character from your recycle bin into play with a SPIRIT counter. On turn end, purge it. (Character’s *RAM cost is set to 0. If they would leave play, purge them instead.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Death is not the end, just a new chapter."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Andrea Lim

property.name: Text
property.value: On enter, draw 1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "One extra toe bean means one extra life."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: You may look at the top card of your cyberdeck at any time. You may play that card. DIVINE 3 (Look at the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Surety brings ruin."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Anas Riasat

property.name: Text
property.value: Seance Sisters get +1/+1 for each other *MYSTIC you control.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Pertti Bahaa

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, draw 1. The next drug you play this turn costs 0 *RAM.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Girl, life is short. You better get out on the dance floor and start living it."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: Take control of target character an opponent controls until turn end. Refresh it and reboot its abilities.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "There's nowhere to hide when the enemy is inside."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: You may play tarots reversed. You gain 1 *MF and 1 *BF health for each tarot in your recycle bin. If you also control [Lilith, the Dark Moon], double this effect.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "She is the light that shines in the darkness, the reawakening of hope."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: You may play tarots reversed. Deal 1 *MF damage to target player for each tarot in your recycle bin. If you also control [Luna, the Sacred Moon], double this effect.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "She is the darkness that defines the light, the destruction that brings rebirth."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value:
If a source would deal *BF damage to you, prevent that damage and put a fracture counter on Amethyst Datashard.
Whenever you put a fracture counter on Amethyst Datashard, if it has 2 or more, purge it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Long revered for its protective properties, this crystal's power has been enhanced by a quantum field amplifier."

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, gain 1 *MF and 1 *BF health.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Healing energy you can feel as soon as it enters the room."

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, deal 1 *MF damage to each opponent.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Unstable, malevolent energy waiting to be unleashed."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value:
On enter, create a *MF 0/1 Butterfly token character.
On your SYSTEM CHECK, double the number of Butterfly token characters you control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Chaos is the engine of creation."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Draw 1, then discard 1.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text

property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Counter target character. REVERSED program

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Draw 1 and install 1 *RAM running. REVERSED 2 *RAM.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put up to 2 target characters into their owners' hands. REVERSED programs

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Counter target card unless its controller pays 1 *RAM. REVERSED 3 *RAM

property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put two +1/+1 counters on 2 target characters. When one of these characters is destroyed, destroy the other.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Change the target(s) of target program. REVERSED ability

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target character gets +2/+2 until turn end. REVERSED -2/-2

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put target character into its owner's hand. REVERSED on top of its owner's cyberdeck.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Name a *RAM cost, then reveal the top card of your cyberdeck. If its *RAM cost is the named cost, install 1 *RAM running. REVERSED draw 2.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT If a character's attack hits target player this turn, prevent half that damage, rounded down, and deal *MF damage equal to the prevented damage to that character's controller.

property.name: Text
property.value:
*SWIFT ADDITIONAL COST [Destroy a *MYSTIC character you control.]
Counter target card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target character. If you do, its controller creates a *MF 2/2 Revenant token character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target character can't be destroyed this turn. REVERSED program

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Target character gets +10 PSYCHOSIS until turn end. It must attack this turn if able. REVERSED +15

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Reveal the top 4 cards of your cyberdeck. Target opponent puts them facedown into 2 piles. Put 1 pile into your hand, then bin the other.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Agha Asim

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT DIVINE 3 (Look at the top 3 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 into your hand, then bin the rest.)

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Run X target characters, where X is the number of tarots played this turn. REVERSED cards

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Search your cyberdeck for a tarot and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle. REVERSED program

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Until turn end, whenever a character you control is destroyed by an opponent, destroy target character. REVERSED program

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Search your cyberdeck for an environment and reveal it. Put it into your hand, then shuffle.

property.name: Text
property.value:
Opponents play with their hands revealed.
You may look at any facedown cards in play.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value:
Prevent all damage. On NETCHECK, add 1 anicca counter to Zen Garden. Then, if it has 5 or more, destroy it.
If Zen Garden would leave play, purge it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Whatever has the nature of arising also has the nature of ceasing."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Imad Awan

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player may purge a character they control to put target *MYSTIC character from their recycle bin into their hand.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The longer you spend here, the easier it is to forget it isn't real."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: On enter, all characters in recycle bins that share a faction with their owner's mainframe are put into play under their owner's control with a SPIRIT counter on them. (Character’s *RAM cost is set to 0. If they would leave play, purge them instead.) When The Spirit Realm leaves play, purge all characters with SPIRIT counters.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Second to the liver, no one puts in more work at a show."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hasan

property.name: Text
property.value:
On enter, until Sinister Manager leaves play, target iconic *THRASHER character you control gets +4/+4 and OVERRUN. (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.)
When Sinister Manager leaves play, destroy that character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Why is this ink so... red?"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Adam Roberts

property.name: Text
property.value: On enter, target iconic *THRASHER character you control gets +2/+0 until Groupie leaves play.

property.name: Artist
property.value: M Fakhrur Rozzi

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy Stage Diver. If you do, deal 1 *BF damage to up to 2 target characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The higher they fly, the harder they fall."

property.name: Text
property.value: If Frenzied Fan would be destroyed, you may pay 2 *MF and 2 *BF health to put them into their owner's hand instead.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "There's a fine line between fandom and obssession."

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *BF damage to all other characters in play. Put a -1/-1 counter on Mosher.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Step into the pit and let it all go."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value:
On your NETCHECK, put 1 drink counter to Edward 40 Hands.
Edward 40 Hands gets +4/+0 for every 2 drink counters on him.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Greatness requires dedication."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Bryan Maciel

property.name: Text
property.value: FEEDBACK (Whenever character is dealt damage, it deals that much *BF damage to the source's controller.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A virtuoso of violence."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: Other *THRASHER characters you control get +1/+1 until turn end.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Just be glad it's the drums she's beating."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Arian Zamanpour

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target program.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "I'm just here to play."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Pertti Bahaa

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, all *THRASHER characters get +2/+0 and all other characters get -1/-1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "His axe isn't just an instrument—it's a statement."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, all non-*THRASHER characters get +10 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "The Brainshredder is definitely one of the most unique-sounding instruments of the 21st century."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Nate Artuz

property.name: Text
property.value: On your NETCHECK, put 1 rage counter on Roxy Riot. When her attack hits a player, she deals 1 *BF damage to them for each rage counter on her. When a player destroys her, deal 3 *BF damage to them for each rage counter on her.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "I have a high tolerance for booze and a low tolerance for bullshit."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Reese Keefe

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target running character. Until turn end, *THRASHER characters you control get +2/+0 and OVERRUN.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Beneath the chrome and flesh, a demon stirs."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, put 1 mosh counter on Wall of Death. Then, if it has 2 or more mosh counters, purge it. If you do, until turn end, all characters must attack or block if able and all *THRASHER characters get +2/+2.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A truly beautiful thing to witness."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Helge Balzer

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Your corpses will fuel the fires of hell!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target character. You lose *MF and *BF health equal to its attack value.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "As he felt every bone in his jaw shatter, he immediately regretted this decision."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Destroy target blocking character with defense value of 2 or less.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Keep your head above water or drown."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Helge Balzer

property.name: Text
property.value:
*SWIFT ADDITIONAL COST [Pay X *MF and X *BF health.]
Target *THRASHER character gets +X/+0 until turn end. On turn end, destroy it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Time to burn this place to the ground!"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value:
MALICIOUS (Attach to any target character.)
Attached character gets +8 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)
On its controller's NETCHECK, put a -1/-1 counter on attached character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets BIOVAMP (When character’s attack hits a player for *BF damage, you gain that much *BF health.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Perfectly good blood is a shame to waste."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rahan Karim

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +3/+0. When it becomes blocked, it deals 1 *BF damage to each character blocking it.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "This machine kills corpo scum."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: Double the base attack value of attached character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Gigadyne amps will blow the wool off an electric sheep."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Helge Balzer

property.name: Text
property.value: Put two -1/-1 counters on attached character, then deal 6 *BF damage to up to 3 target characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A hellish beast only the most skilled shredders can master."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: MALICIOUS (Attach to any target character.) Attached character can't be force quit and gets +15 PSYCHOSIS. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.) If attached to [Xax Xanthos], he gets +6/+0 and is immune to PSYCHOSIS.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value:
MALICIOUS (Attach to any target character.)
Attached character can't be force quit. Double its PSYCHOSIS.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Can someone turn this thing down?”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Teejay Villahermosa

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target running character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Sometimes simple technology is the most effective."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever a non-*THRASHER character takes *BF damage, destroy them.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Where all the greats got their start—and, sometimes, their end."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: Damage can't be prevented.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "I'm going to feel this tomorrow."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: A cyberdeck can have any number of cards named [Nanobot Swarm]. Nanobot Swarm gets +1/+0 for each other *NANOBOT character you control.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "They flow like water, a devastating force of nature."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: Install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "These tireless drones scavenge scrap to fuel the hive's molten core."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your cyberdeck for [Xandra, Hive Queen] and reveal her. Put her into your hand, then shuffle. Purge Nanobot Messenger.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "You might want to shoot this messenger."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: ADDITIONAL COST [Run 2 *NANOBOT characters you control.] ADDITIONAL COST [Run and destroy any number of *NANOBOT characters you control.] For each *NANOBOT destroyed this way, deal *BF damage equal to its attack value to target character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: Until turn end, *NANOBOT characters you control get +1/+1 and OVERRUN. (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Henry Peters

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player creates a *BF 1/1 *NANOBOT Drone token character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "If you hear a metallic hum in the distance, it's already too late."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Nate Artuz

property.name: Text
property.value: Put an INVERT counter on target *WONDERLAND character. If it already has one, remove 1 instead. (Character swaps its attack type.) If you control a Pawn token, a Bishop token, and a Rook token, and your opponents control a total of 1 character, you win the game.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Benedykt Szneider

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy up to 2 target characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Sentence first—verdict afterwards."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: Gain 2 *MF or 2 *BF health.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “You will observe the rules of battle, of course?”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 2 *MF or 2 *BF damage to target player.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "I always do."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: When Mad Hatter leaves play, destroy all characters with tea party counters. Reveal the top 2 cards of your cyberdeck. Put a *WONDERLAND character from among them into play with a tea party counter on it and set its *RAM cost to 0. Bin the rest.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Teejay Villahermosa

property.name: Text
property.value: Put a -1/-1 counter on target character. Put a +1/+1 counter on another target *WONDERLAND character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Who are you?"

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rushil Kerjiwal

property.name: Text
property.value:
On NETCHECK, the active player may roll a d20. If they control (Alice, Dreamwalker), they roll twice instead.
1–3 | They destroy a character they control, unless they control (Alice, Dreamwalker).
4–17 | They may choose target character and put an INVERT counter on it. If it already has one, remove 1 instead. (Character swaps its attack type.)
18+ | They reveal the top card of their cyberdeck. If it can be played, they set its *RAM cost to 0 and play it; if not, bin it.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Risza Perdhana

property.name: Text
property.value:
Attach to target player's mainframe. The following abilities only trigger if your *WONDERLAND synergy is 2 or more:
When this becomes attached to a mainframe, if it's an opponent's, deal 1 *MF or 1 *BF damage to them; if it's yours or a teammate's, you gain 1 *MF or 1 *BF health.
On your SYSTEM CHECK, attach this to a different mainframe if possible.

property.name: Text
property.value:
*SWIFT All characters your opponents control get -1/-1 until turn end.
If you control [Alice, Dreamwalker], instead put a -1/-1 counter on these characters.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value:
*SWIFT All characters you control get +1/+1 until turn end.
If you control [Alice, Dreamwalker], instead put a +1/+1 counter on these characters.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sanabil Hassan

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Put an INVERT counter on target character. If it already has one, remove 1 instead. (Character swaps its attack type.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "In another moment, Alice was through the glass and had jumped lightly down into the looking glass room."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Helge Balzer

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Humanity rarely stops to ask if something should be done. If it can be done, it will."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Juni Frio

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy B.O.B. If you do, deal 4 *MF and 4 *BF damage to all players, and deal 4 *BF damage to all characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "With the flip of a switch, this 'big ol' bomb' transforms from harmless robot to devastating weapon. Approach with caution."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value:
On enter, destroy all *RAM you control.
The *RAM cost of all cards in play that you control and their activated abilities is 0. Until turn end, you may play up to 2 cards without paying their *RAM cost.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: Project Archangel can’t attack or block unless it has 1 or more ARMOR counters. On your SYSTEM CHECK, if it has no ARMOR counters, put 1 on it. (If character would be destroyed, instead remove an ARMOR counter from it.) Destroy all other characters and programs. On turn end, purge Project Archangel.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Destroy target cyberware.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Phoebe Randall

property.name: Text
property.value:
ADDITIONAL COST [Pay 3 *MF and 3 *BF health.]
Take an extra turn after this one. Purge Déjà Vu.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Here, kitty kitty kitty kitty..."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Katerina Belikova

property.name: Text
property.value:
MALICIOUS (Attach to any target character.)
Attached character gets +15 PSYCHOSIS and must attack if able. (When character attacks or runs, roll a d20. If you roll less than its PSYCHOSIS, its attack hits you and this action fails.)

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Quit hitting yourself."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Andi Cahyo W

property.name: Text
property.value:
*SWIFT Select one —
• Destroy target program attached to your mainframe. • Remove all counters on your mainframe.

property.name: Text
property.value: *SWIFT Destroy target program.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "THREAT IDENTIFIED: MALICIOUS PROCESS. INITIATING FORCED TERMINATION SEQUENCE..."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Talha Tahir

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy target character.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "As he felt his code decompiling, he wondered if he had ever really existed at all."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: Destroy all characters and programs.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Look at this city. Millions of people going about their lives, completely unaware that it could all come crashing down in an instant."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rahan Karim

property.name: Text
property.value: Purge all recycle bins.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: Angel City produces a megaton of waste every day, and it all goes right into the ocean.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Sean Donaldson

property.name: Text
property.value: Attached character gets +2/+0.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "A workhorse of a weapon used by the ACPD and other street gangs."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Eran Fowler

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach to target player's mainframe. On their SYSTEM CHECK, they take 2 *MF and 2 *BF damage, then they draw 1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "For just that one moment, you feel with your entire soul that the dream is reality."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rushil Kerjiwal

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, the active player may destroy 1 *RAM they control to draw 1.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: “Who says you have to choose?”

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: All characters' base attack values are swapped with their base defense values.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Down is the new up."

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rushil Kerjiwal

property.name: Text
property.value: There can be any number of environments in play. Environments aren't destroyed when a new environment enters. When Multiverse leaves play, purge all other environments.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "If you could dream an infinite number of lives in an infinite number of worlds, eventually you would dream the life that you are living right now."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Anas Riasat

property.name: Text
property.value: On NETCHECK, Acid Rain deals 1 *BF damage to all characters.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "Some stay dry and others feel the pain."

property.name: Artist
property.value: Reese Keefe

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 1 *MF damage to any target. Instead, deal 2 *MF damage to any target.

property.name: Text
property.value: Deal 2 *MF damage to target player. + Draw 1.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Matheus Calza

property.name: Text
property.value: +1/+1 for each cyberware attached to them. Instead, +2/+1 for each cyberware attached to them.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Abdul Moiz

property.name: Text
property.value: -5 PSYCHOSIS. Instead, -10 PSYCHOSIS.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: Your *RAM comes into play refreshed. + / On your SYSTEM CHECK, install 1 *RAM refreshed.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rabiba Zaineb

property.name: Text
property.value: You lose 1 *MF and 1 *BF health. Install 1 *RAM running. Instead, you lose 2 *MF and 2 *BF. Install 2 *RAM refreshed.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Daniel Batista

property.name: Text
property.value: When you a play a tether, draw 1. + / When you play a *DUSTRUNNER character, draw 1.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: MIRAGE (When character is targeted by an opponent, you may put it into its owner’s hand.) + They can only be blocked by 2 or more characters.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Misha Zia

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, look at the top card of your cyberdeck. You may bin it. + / You may play tarots reversed.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: When you play a tarot, create a *MF 0/1 Dreamwalker token character. + / All Dreamwalker tokens get +1/+1.

property.name: Text
property.value: +1/+1 until turn end. Instead, +2/+2 until turn end.

property.name: Text
property.value: +1/+0 until turn end. + OVERRUN until turn end. (Character deals excess damage to defending player when blocked.)

property.name: Artist
property.value: Saad Irfan

property.name: Text
property.value: Put a +1/+1 counter on target character. Instead, put two +1/+1 counters on target character.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Johnathan Chong

property.name: Text
property.value: +1/+1 until turn end. Instead, +2/+2 until turn end.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Samra Shireen

property.name: Text
property.value: DIVINE 2 (Look at the top 2 cards of your cyberdeck. Put 1 into your hand, then bin the other.) Instead, DIVINE 2 for each blocked *MYSTIC or *DUSTRUNNER.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Bee Xuan Ni

property.name: Text
property.value: Characters you control with *CYBERNETIC gear get STAMINA. + / Characters you control with *THRASHER gear get FEEDBACK.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Bee Xuan Ni

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per turn, install 1 *RAM running. Instead, install 1 *RAM running.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Zhi You

property.name: Text
property.value: For double their cost. As they resolve, purge them. Instead, for their base cost. As they resolve, purge them.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Text
property.value: When 1 or more non-token *NANOBOT characters you control are destroyed by an opponent, create a *BF 1/1 *NANOBOT Drone token character. + / All *NANOBOT characters you control get +1/+1.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Rushil Kerjiwal

property.name: Text
property.value: 0/1 Pawn token character with *MF or *BF attack. Or 3/3 Bishop token character with *MF or *BF attack.

property.name: Artist
property.value: Liew Yen Hwa

property.name: Rarity
property.value: QUANTUM RARE

property.name: Artist
property.value: Juni Frio

property.name: Text
property.value: Terry, the Accountant is immune to PSYCHOSIS. Swipe Terry, the Accountant across the arena like a credit card. Attach target gear to him.

property.name: Flavor Text
property.value: "You had me at piña coladas and coconut shrimp."
